feature: arch-graph API, remediation memory (ADR-072), and consolidation opportunity detector (ADR-073)
summary: Three related capabilities shipped together: (1) drift.arch_graph module provides ArchGraph/ArchGraphStore, decision constraints, feedback-loop pattern detection, reuse index, and graph seeding from drift-map output. (2) ADR-072 Remediation Memory: RepairTemplateRegistry.similar_outcomes() returns compact past-outcome summaries per (signal, edit_kind); fix_plan enriches each AgentTask with similar_outcomes to guide repair choices. (3) ADR-073 Consolidation Opportunity Detector: build_consolidation_groups() clusters batch-eligible tasks into ConsolidationGroup objects; TaskGraph exposes consolidation_opportunities and each task carries a consolidation_group_id back-reference.
design_goals: Provide a graph-backed architecture context store for steering and rule suggestions
Surface historical repair outcomes to agents at fix-plan time
Identify and cluster batch-eligible tasks for agent loop efficiency
All new capabilities degrade gracefully when data is absent
non_goals: No changes to scoring weights or thresholds
No breaking changes to existing API surface

self_analysis.notes: No signal logic changed; arch_graph and consolidation features are additive API extensions only.
